name: Architectural-Debt-Ratio (ADR)
description: Quantifies the structural risk of the system by measuring the ratio of 'Legacy/Sub-optimal' architectural nodes against 'Scalable/Standardized' nodes.
goalMapping: Enforces the 'Technical-Debt-Threshold-Protocol' to ensure long-term system sustainability.

thresholds.critical: > 35% (Mandatory 'Freeze-Order' on all new features via SMGP)
